executives.name: Dale Asplund
executives.background: Dale A. Asplund has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer since May 2019. He joined United Rentals in 1998 and has held various senior positions in operations and supply chain.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director
